negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_236
prompt: In a well-lit café or restaurant with large glass windows and doors allowing natural light to flood in, four individuals are seated around a light-colored wooden table. The setting includes small square coasters and glasses filled with beverages. One person wears a striped shirt, another sports a black t-shirt with visible tattoos on their arms, a third dons a black blazer over a white shirt, and the fourth is dressed in a white top. The camera starts with a medium shot capturing the group from behind, focusing on their upper bodies and the table. As the sequence progresses, the individuals begin to raise their glasses in a toast, starting with the glasses held low towards the table and gradually lifting them higher until they are raised high in a collective clinking gesture. The final frame captures this moment of toasting, with the camera zooming in towards the raised glasses, partially obscuring the faces of two of the people.
